title: NoPlayerKill
description: A plugin that disables the option to die from another player, but you can still take damge.
body:
# NoPlayerKill - Disables Killing. You're running a SMP? Or just starting a survival server?
**If so, this plugin is for you!**
The plugin won't let players kill each other, but will let them damge other players until they are in half a heart! ### Commands /nokill (true/false) - Disables or Enables the No Kill Feature.
